designConstraints: Drawer panel design only — no full-page navigation, no NavigationTabs, no TopBar, no footer
Must include a close/dismiss affordance (X button) in the top-right corner of the drawer header
Drawer slides in from the right side of the viewport, consistent with the dashboard's 'Open settings drawer' trigger from topbar-logo
Background overlay uses semantic token 'overlay' (rgba(0,0,0,0.65)) behind the drawer panel
Drawer panel background uses surface-elevated token (navy-raised: #293548) to lift above the page surface
Panel width should be fixed (e.g., 360–400px) on desktop, full-width on mobile breakpoint (≤640px)
Must follow 8px grid system for all internal spacing (spacing scale: 4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64)
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy within the drawer content
All interactive controls must meet minimum touch target size of 44×44px
Border radius: inputs use medium (10px), cards/sections use large (16px), pill elements use pill (9999px)
Elevation level 3 (0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) applied to the drawer panel as it is an overlay element
Z-index must be at modal level (1200) to appear above sticky elements and dropdowns
Content max-width constraint of 1280px does not apply inside the drawer; drawer has its own fixed width
Typography: headings use DM Sans (display), body/labels use DM Mono (body) per font family tokens
CTA buttons use gold-amber (#F59E0B) background with deep-navy (#0F172A) text (text-on-cta token)
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber with 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity: 0.38 per opacity.scale.disabled token
Motion: drawer open/close animation uses normal duration (300ms) with default easing cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
referencePatterns: Drawer/sheet overlay pattern with dimmed backdrop and slide-in animation from right
Settings form layout: vertically stacked labeled sections with dividers between groups
Inline label + control row pattern (label left-aligned, control right-aligned) for toggle and select inputs
Section header pattern using heading-2 (16px/600/DM Sans) with muted-text secondary description below
Input field pattern: surface-input (deep-navy) background, slate-border default border, gold-amber focus border
Save/Apply CTA button: full-width, gold-amber background, deep-navy text, large border radius (16px), 44px min height
Destructive action pattern: coral-error (#F87171) text color for dangerous settings actions
Currency selector using chip or dropdown pattern consistent with CategoryChipGrid and PaymentMethodChipRow on add-expense page
SettingsDialog component referenced across dashboard, add-expense, and spending-insights pages — drawer content should be consistent with that shared component's visual language
Close button: icon-only X button in top-right of drawer header, minimum 44×44px touch target, silver-text color with hover state
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text against backgrounds (silver-text #CBD5E1 on navy-raised #293548 passes; muted-text #64748B on navy-raised must be used only for non-essential decorative text)
Drawer must trap focus when open — keyboard focus must not escape to the underlying page content
Close button must be the first focusable element in the drawer for efficient keyboard dismissal
Pressing Escape key must close the drawer and return focus to the triggering element (topbar-logo/settings icon)
All form inputs must have visible, programmatically associated labels (not placeholder-only labels)
All interactive controls must be keyboard navigable via Tab/Shift+Tab in logical reading order
Focus ring must be visible on all interactive elements: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset
Drawer panel must have role='dialog' and aria-modal='true' with a descriptive aria-label (e.g., 'User Settings')
Select/dropdown inputs must use native <select> or ARIA combobox pattern with aria-expanded and aria-haspopup attributes
Toggle switches must use role='switch' with aria-checked state announced to screen readers
Error states on form fields must use aria-invalid='true' and aria-describedby pointing to the error message element
Success confirmation (e.g., after saving settings) must be announced via an aria-live='polite' region
Backdrop overlay must have aria-hidden='true' so screen readers do not read the dimmed background content
Minimum touch target of 44×44px for all interactive elements including the close button and form controls
Currency and budget input fields must include appropriate inputmode attributes (e.g., inputmode='decimal' for numeric fields) for mobile keyboard optimization
dataModelDependencies: UserSettings entity (id, currency, default_monthly_budget, locale, created_at, updated_at) from user_settings table — primary data model for this drawer
GET /api/settings endpoint to fetch current user settings on drawer open
PUT /api/settings endpoint to persist updated currency preference and default monthly budget
Budget entity (amount, currency, month, year) — indirectly affected when default_monthly_budget is updated in UserSettings
Expense entity (currency field) — currency token from UserSettings propagates to expense display formatting across all pages
